texto: All i have to offer is this: i hold a valid driver's license and I know the way to the hospital. I can hang curtains, flip a mattress, load a dishwasher. I can deliver a pizza, lend a steadying arm, laugh at a morbid joke and compliment a bad wig and I know the metric system. I doubt that's gonna be enough.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brian Fies sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “All i have to offer is this: i hold a valid driver's license and I know the way to the hospital. …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, cancer, family, útil em momentos de termino e family.
